Package org.docgene.model.globals

Contains the global elements for the wiki model.

See: Description

  • Interface Summary 
    Interface Description
    Locales
    The supported locales.
    SearchOptions
    The Search options.
  • Class Summary 
    Class Description
    AbstractMenuItem
    Represent a menu item on a left menu in an article, or any other page in the HTML wiki.
    ArticleCategory
    Represents an article category.
    ArticlesCategories
    Represents the articles categories.
    ArticlesDictionary
    Maintains the dictionary of articles sorted by their first letter.
    ArticlesGlossary
    Maintains a glossary of terms sorted by their first letter.
    ArticlesGlossary.Letter
    Represents one Letter in the glossary.
    ArticlesModel
    Represents the root for the model.
    DefaultMenuItem
    Represent a default Menu Item.
    ExternalMenuItem
    Represent a Menu Item pointing to an external link.
    InternalMenuItem
    Represent a Menu Item pointing to an internal link.
    Localization
    Hold the localization for the wiki.

Package org.docgene.model.globals Description

Contains the global elements for the wiki model.
